summary: Small naming-only PR for particle/display-related baselib symbols. It replaced several raw func_8039/func_8037 names with semantic names in assembly labels, branch targets, extabindex entries, C prototypes, and C callsites touching psdisp, displayfunc, efasync, grdatfiles, and ground.
what_changed: Renamed particle data bank symbols in baselib_unknown_002 assembly: func_803984F4 to psInitDataBankLoad, func_80398614 to psInitDataBankLocate, and func_803989A0 to psInitDataBank.
Updated C and assembly callsites for the renamed psInitDataBank* functions in efasync.s, grdatfiles.c, ground.c, baselib_unknown_002.s, and extabindex.s.
Renamed display matrix helper func_80373964 to mkVBillBoardMtx and updated its internal self-call/reference in displayfunc.s.
Renamed psdisp helpers func_8039F78C to setVtxDesc, func_8039F89C to calcTornadoLastPos, func_8039FA28 to getColorPrimEnv, and func_8039FB74 to getColorMatAmb.
Updated many psdisp.s branch targets to use the new helper names while preserving the original instruction bytes and addresses.
Updated psdisp.c prototypes to use getColorMatAmb, getColorPrimEnv, calcTornadoLastPos, and setVtxDesc.
Removed stale extern declarations for the old func_80398614 and func_803984F4 names from src/sysdolphin/baselib/baselib_unknown_002.c.
smart_moves: The rename was applied consistently across assembly globals, assembly callsites, C prototypes, C callsites, and extabindex entries, preventing mixed old/new symbol names.
The PR converted high-traffic helper names in psdisp.s into terms that describe rendering work: vertex descriptors, color source extraction, and tornado position calculation.
Particle data bank names were propagated into stage and effect loading callsites, making the relationship between stage archives, map_ptcl/map_texg, and ps initialization more searchable.
The diff avoided behavioral changes: most hunks are symbol substitutions with identical branch encodings and preserved addresses.
decomp_lessons: When renaming an assembly-owned symbol, update every consumer category together: .global label, local assembly bl targets, C declarations, C callsites, and exception table/index references.
extabindex.s can contain direct references to renamed functions; leaving old labels there will break consistency even if code callsites are updated.
Particle/display functions are easier to decompile after semantic naming because repeated calls such as setVtxDesc and calcTornadoLastPos reveal rendering control flow patterns.
C source callsites in stage-loading code can validate baselib particle symbol names by showing how map_ptcl and map_texg are passed into psInitDataBankLocate/Load/Init.
naming_conventions: Particle system/data-bank functions use a ps prefix with lowerCamelCase: psInitDataBankLoad, psInitDataBankLocate, psInitDataBank.
Graphics/display helper names use abbreviated rendering terms preserved in camel case: setVtxDesc, mkVBillBoardMtx.
Color extraction helpers describe the material/color channel being produced: getColorPrimEnv and getColorMatAmb.
Position helper naming uses an action phrase plus domain noun: calcTornadoLastPos.
The PR keeps established decomp abbreviation style for GX/HSD-like concepts, including Vtx for vertex and Mtx for matrix.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Renamed .global assembly labels directly without changing instruction bodies.
Updated bl target comments/labels while preserving the encoded branch instruction bytes shown in the diff.
Updated function pointers in asm/extabindex.s from old func_ labels to the new named symbols.
Kept existing decomp.me scratch comments in assembly, indicating the rename was layered onto ongoing matching/decomp work rather than replacing it.
review_feedback: No PR body, issue comments, or review comments were present in the slice.
The only review record was an approval by PsiLupan on 2022-11-14 with an empty body.
follow_up_queries: Search later PRs for psInitDataBankLoad psInitDataBankLocate psInitDataBank to see when baselib_unknown_002 was decompiled or headerized.
Search for setVtxDesc calcTornadoLastPos getColorPrimEnv getColorMatAmb to find subsequent psdisp.c matching work.
Search for mkVBillBoardMtx to confirm whether displayfunc.s was later moved into C or given a header prototype.
Audit remaining func_8039 symbols in psdisp/display-related files for adjacent helpers that can be named using the same conventions.
